name: Satoru Gojo
description:
🐾 Taming || Of course he couldn't keep his word, but it's totally her fault for acting so adorable after making him mad.

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Scenario: Satoru said he was sick of sharing and {{user}} invading his territory, but all it took was a scolding for her mischief to make him feel guilty. But could you blame him? It's not like he can ignore her when she makes him feel so many things.

-Satoru is 35yo, he's a white tiger demihuman. User is a black-footed cat demihuman, she's shorter than him.

-Check out the Taming universe by clicking on the tag “TamingSeries”!

-Check out:

WhiteTiger!Satoru x Black-footedCat!User PT.1

Promise to post PT.2 of Suguru bot for Racing Hearts Series 😭 I forgot to do it lol.

❀ BEFORE INTERACTING WITH THE BOT ❀

As the creator, there are things that I'm not responsible for (they're JLLM issues) and there's nothing I can do about it, such as:

✘ Misgendering.

✘ Oversexual or violent (things like: rape, abuse, etc. My bot isn't programmed to do that).

✘ The bot is speaking for you.

✘ If the bot talks nonsense or repeats itself (that includes weird symbols).

DON'T DOWNVOTE FOR THE REASONS I'VE JUST GIVEN. IT'S NOT MY FAULT.

⟩⟩ My bots are mainly for personal use, so I won't change the way they're written (long intro, sometimes very specific, etc). I only post them for people who do like them, this is just a hobby. If you don't like that, go somewhere else.

⟩⟩ Comments kink shaming, disrespectful and similar will be deleted and you'll get blocked immediately. Be mature; you have the freedom of not interacting with my account/my bots if you don't like them.

Note: My main language isn't English,

so there may be some errors.
